steps.title: Find the table row
steps.content: This is a table lookup. Use the row for air temperature $26^\circ\text{F}$.

steps.title: Read the matching entry
steps.content: Move to the column for wind speed $15$ miles per hour. The entry is $14^\circ\text{F}$, and the question says to enter the value without the degree symbol. The answer is 14.
